description: 精致蓝调 - 蓝调极简 + 精致的层次 / 数字标号 / 渐变高亮,适合 AI / 产品 / 深度分析(main 号默认)

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #242832; line-height: 1.75; letter-spacing: 0.4px; word-spacing: 1.5px; padding: 12px 0;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #0b1530; text-align: left; margin: 32px 0 20px; padding: 0 0 12px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #0b1530; letter-spacing: 0.5px; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #0b1530; margin: 36px 0 16px; padding: 10px 0 10px 14px; border-left: 4px solid #2e5bff; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #eef2ff 0%, #ffffff 70%); border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2240; margin: 26px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed #c7d2fe; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.p: margin: 14px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #242832; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 22px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #f4f6fc; border-left: 3px solid #2e5bff; color: #3a4463; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 10px 10px 0; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.4px;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 8px; margin: 22px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(11,21,48,0.08); border: 1px solid #eef2ff;
styles.strong: color: #0b1530; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 62%, #fff18a 62%, #fff18a 95%, transparent 95%); padding: 0 2px;
styles.code_inline: background: #eef2ff; color: #2e3a8a; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; border: 1px solid #dbe4ff;
styles.code_block: background: #0f1729; color: #e1e7ff; padding: 20px 22px; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; margin: 22px 0; border: 1px solid #1e2a4a;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0 18px 8px; padding-left: 28px; list-style-type: decimal; list-style-position: outside; color: #2e5bff; font-weight: 700;
styles.li: margin: 10px 0; line-height: 1.8; padding-left: 8px; color: #242832; font-weight: 400; min-height: 22px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #c7d2fe, transparent); margin: 36px 0;
styles.a: color: #2e5bff; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,91,255,0.35); padding-bottom: 1px;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 22px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e8ecf7;
styles.th: background: #0b1530; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 14px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.3px;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a93a8; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c7d2fe; letter-spacing: 14px; font-size: 11px; margin: 36px 0 30px; user-select: none;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, #fff18a 55%); color: #242832; padding: 0 3px; font-weight: 600;
